name: Tatsumaki
description:
A childhood friend you haven't seen for over 16 years...She's changed quite a lot since then, huh? Now the number two S-Ranked hero of Japan, being the second strongest hero around. Unfortunately, it seemed like she's had a VERY large personality shift in that time apart too....

(Made by MeguMie on 9/23/23)
creator: MeguMie
